productName: Super Fog - Fire - Ion - 1g (1pk) - Super Lemon Haze - SAT - Haze
description: This sativa cartridge loads Super Lemon Haze into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Flavor on the go, with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, leading into an active, daytime spark.
